headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' *.clerk.accounts.dev; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *.ytimg.com *.cloudfront.net img.clerk.com; connect-src 'self' *.clerk.accounts.dev *.clerk.com api.anthropic.com;
